---
title: "PuMP*: SIGHTLESS TRUFFLE"
mainfont: Special Elite
---

__BACKGROUND__ <br>
H

__PHYSICAL FEATURES__ <br>
__Obscure survivalist:__ Always adorned in some form of camo he easily disguises himself in any environment.
He has two defining features: A green headband he'll use to cover his eye*, and Kiran.
Kiran being a very intelligent Crab-eating macaque generally found sleeping in TRUFFLE's ghillie suit.


__PERSONALITY QUIRKS__ <br>
__X but Y:__  <br>
__W yet Z:__ 

__FAVOURED GEAR__

- Ghillie suit
- Ultimate Iron hollow handle survival knife*
- Ishapore 2A1 bolt-action rifle

__PRIMAL STATS__ <br>
JAWS:0 | EYES:+1 | LIMBS:+2 | NERVES:0

__PRIMAL ABILITIES__ <br>
__Smell-nar\*:__ He has a remarkable sense of smell and can envision the world with it.
Breaking the law of physics he's able to sense smells that are downwind of his position.
His maximum range is based on the amount of smells, he can only process so much, and physical barriers. <br>
__Hyphae-nated:__ His skin is covered in fungus that can extract nutrients from the ground.
The fungus then shares these nutrients with its host*.
This is an incredibly useful ability for hiding in one spot for prolonged periods.

*Improves his Smell-nar
*I'm very envious of this knife. Its an original made for the first Oxbow movie!<br> 
*Smell Navigation And Ranging, like sonar but with smell<br>
*VEILED NIGHTJAR has tried giving the fungus to other people but it only survives on SIGHTLESS TRUFFLE and Karan<br>
